summary: Retest of button-spacing fix (space-y-4 -> flex flex-col gap-4). Measured actual bounding-box vertical gap between the two stacked pill buttons on /dpd, /printer, /wea, and homepage. All measured 16.0px exactly (previously 0px). Password page horizontal icon buttons measured 12px gap. Navigation and clickability verified.
critical_code_review_comments: The 'flex flex-col gap-4' pattern used here is the correct fix and reliable regardless of child display type (button vs Link-wrapped button). Consider standardizing this pattern for all stacked button groups project-wide to prevent regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Button spacing bug is fully resolved. All 4 tools + homepage now have proper 16px vertical gaps between stacked pill buttons; password page horizontal icon buttons have 12px gap. No further action required on this bug.
rca of the issue: Root cause (fixed in this iteration): Tailwind space-y-* utilities apply margin-top to sibling children via the > * + * selector but only take effect on block-level children. The 'Check out other tools' button was wrapped in a react-router <Link> (default display:inline) so the margin was ignored, collapsing the vertical gap to 0. Mitigation applied by main agent: switch container to 'flex flex-col gap-4' which uses CSS gap on the flex container, independent of child display type. Verified: measured 16px gap on all three affected pages.
